item.title: You’re not alone
item.description:
You’re not alone
You’re not alone
Suicide is the leading cause for Australians aged 15 to 44. Traffic accidents also are in the top three causes of death for young Australians. https://www.abc.net.au/news/2023-09-27/abs-deaths-in-graphs-covid-heart-disease-suicide/102907992 Men’s helpline Australia 1300789978 You’re not alone Edit: thank you all for upvoting for awareness - pls repost
item.dc:creator: thebansheee

Source: https://www.webtoons.com/en/canvas/pixie-and-brutus/list?title_no=452175&page=1
His comic can also be found at https://www.patreon.com/petfoolery/
No bigfoot in this one
But did you find the queen?
Bonus video (NOT my dog/cat, just a cute video I saw on here and re-posted so you all can see how cute they are together)
And bonus picture because it is so cute

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i knew it.. greetings online friends
yep... there's your problem
sounds like they should start a company
don't look to the right gang
reminds me of that Simpsons go to Japan episode
as is tradition
Columbus- what a goof
befuddling
mmm hmm
rookie numbers
stay strong. those who are partaking
finally
good times
the dream
that technique is so sick
always
certainly not exclusive to 70s music
that's my time.. have a great weekend, gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: I would watch the hell out of this
item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Tough day
item.description:
She went from sluggish to dead in a matter of hours. Urgent care had her less than hour. We live 4 minutes away and they sent us home and we didn't make it back in time when they called us back in. Our 5 year old handled it great. Wife and I are wrecks internally. Zoe crossed the bifrost at 12.5 years old. I'll miss her forever. Just needed to vent.
Her favorite spot, about to nap. Edit: Ok, wow fellow Imgurians. I just wanted to thank you all for the compassion and solidarity you've expressed here. I don't often make posts and I was expecting my vent to die in user sub as you do. Your comments have brightened and eased a pretty awful day for my wife and I. Thank you so much. Hug your fur, feather, etc babies. I send you all my love. Keep the faith.
item.dc:creator: galactushungers

item.title: I’m not bringing children into this mess
item.description: Most Viral edit: I didn’t expect this to make front page. I can’t respond to everyone but just know that I’m happy with my decision, it was a very easy procedure, and with good conscience, I couldn’t bring more humans into this world.

item.title: Have A Pocket
item.description:
I used to laugh at this kind of thing until I brought an apron from home to work. One of my cooks complimented my apron and, immediately... Well... You know what I did and said.
Please show my food blog some love: https://rouxedfood.com/ Any donation helps! https://ko-fi.com/rouxedfood?ref=onboarding_email_founderwelcome
item.dc:creator: RouxedChef

item.title: Low Battery (Comic)
item.description: Hope you guys enjoy this comic! I wanted to make it about how maybe some people seem to have their lives together, when actually pretty much everyone needs their own time to restore their battery. For me personally I get burned out pretty quickly even from seemingly fun things like seeing friends etc. That’s why maybe if you’re drained it’s time to take a break for yourself. A REAL break where it’s just you and what you love. Obviously it’s easier said than done if you have family to look after, an intense job, health problems that may restrict you, or lots of commitments, but for those who do, I hope you can take time to take care of you! The wips for this comic are on my new patreon: miaminicomics! Not to be mistaken with the 18+patreon. Insta: miaminicomics
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Self destructive bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! We've been playing Palworld, Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax. Oh, and, of course, Happy 15th Birthday, Imgur! I've only known you since you were 9 years old, but you have introduced me to some of the dopest people ever.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: 15th Favorite. Happy Birthday Imgur!
item.dc:creator: VoltronTheLegendaryDefender

item.title: Biscuit has made it to Switzerland and made a new friend, a Giraffe | New video from Berlin
item.description:
A little backstory: not long ago, I came up with the idea to create a toy. Its name is Biscuit, a charming piggy crafted by my wife and me. The mission of Biscuit is to travel around the world, passing from hand to hand. Through this project, I aim to connect people globally, showcasing the beauty of our planet and sharing fascinating stories and facts about various places. For this purpose, we created an Instagram page https://www.instagram.com/biscuitroams/ where all updates and adventures of Biscuit will be posted. Additionally, on Imgur. I will compile and publish complete stories. ------ Hello everyone, Biscuit has some great news! After making his way from Berlin to Geneva, Biscuit made a new friend yesterday: a giraffe named Gigi, who is also a fellow traveler and rides a bicycle with the secretary of the LCBC (Laboratory of Computational Chemistry and Biochemistry) at EPFL.
Moreover, Biscuit visited the Large Hadron Collider. Tomorrow I will be able to get all the photos from the Large Hadron Collider and share them with you.
I publish all videos and photos, as well as information about Biscuit's travel companions, on Instagram https://www.instagram.com/biscuitroams/
item.dc:creator: BiscuitRoams

item.title: Colossi of Memnon are two massive monumental stone statues of Pharaoh Amenhotep III (1386-1353 BCE) from the 18th Dynasty of ancient Egypt. They depict the seated king on a throne ornamented with imagery of his mother, his wife, the god Hapy
item.dc:creator: Joyika
